t_ch: 嘘，别打岔。
t_en: Shh, don't interrupt.

t_ch: 怎么，跟丢了？
t_en: What, you lost him?

t_ch: 没那回事。
t_en: Not even close.

t_ch: 很久没动手了，死伤概不负责。
t_en: Fair warning: I'm out of practice. If you get hurt, that's your problem.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，你的拳脚一点也不痛啊。
t_en: Hehe, your fists don't hurt at all.

t_ch: 不死途先生！住手！
t_en: Mr. Ashveil, stop!

t_ch: 抱歉，不死途先生，我必须阻止你。
t_en: I'm sorry, Mr. Ashveil. I have to stop you.

t_ch: 好样的，灰烬战士！正义的使者！
t_en: Hooray, Cinderborne! The bringer of justice!

t_ch: 给我闭嘴！
t_en: Shut up!

t_ch: 痛苦不应存在。
t_en: Pain should not exist.

t_ch: 笑一笑吧！
t_en: Please smile!

t_ch: 不要让笑声停下来。
t_en: Don't let the laughter stop.

t_ch: 痛苦的人不应存在。
t_en: No one should have to suffer.

t_ch: 所有人都会幸福！
t_en: Everyone will be happy!

t_ch: 永远的、极乐的幸福！
t_en: Everlasting, blissful, HAPPINESS!

t_ch: 微笑
t_en: Smile

t_ch: 幸福
t_en: Happiness

t_ch: 又见面了，各位。
t_en: We meet again, everyone.

t_ch: 幸好，那枚象征好运的筹码常伴{NICKNAME}身侧，帮助我锁定到了你们的坐标。
t_en: Fortunately, {NICKNAME}'s lucky chip helped me locate you.

t_ch: 未能及时出手，而令诸位身陷险境，我必须诚挚道歉。
t_en: Please accept my sincerest apologies for not intervening in time and putting all of you in danger.

t_ch: 你在我身上放追踪器！
t_en: You were tracking me!

t_ch: 多谢，下次别送我追踪器了。
t_en: Thanks, but please don't gift me any more tracking devices.

t_ch: 她其实也在我兜里放了，但我把那玩意儿当成纪念品放网上拍卖了。得亏你还留着它，不然咱们就完蛋了。
t_en: Actually, she put one in my pocket too, but I auctioned it online as a souvenir. Thank goodness you kept yours, otherwise we'd be done for.

t_ch: 真珠女士，我们刚才身处的地方究竟是……？
t_en: Madam Pearl, where exactly were we just now...?

t_ch: 诸位坠落之处被称为：「残卷」，是二相乐园从画中复归现实的过程中从「画卷」上剥离的空间，这些碎片空间一刻不停地撕扯着现实与画中世界。
t_en: The place where you fell is called a "torn scroll." It is a space that peeled from the "scroll painting" during Planarcadia's return to reality. These splintered spaces continuously rip at both reality and the World in Canvas.

t_ch: 异常防御部本以为类似的现象已趋于稳定…但根据观测：就在诸位与破晓战队交手时，「残卷」的扰动突然加剧了。很遗憾，原因：尚不明了。
t_en: The Department of Aberration Defense originally thought this kind of phenomenon had stabilized... but based on observation: During your encounter with the Daybreak Squadron, there was a sudden spike of disturbances from the "torn scroll." Unfortunately, the cause: unclear.

t_ch: 为此，我不得不启用基石的力量解析空间构成，以幻造技法填补裂隙，才将你们带离彼处。异常防御部已启动应急程序安抚民众，善后相关事宜。
t_en: Therefore, I had to use the power of the Cornerstone to analyze the space, then mend the fissure with imagenesis in order to bring you out. The Department of Aberration Defense has initiated emergency protocols to reassure the public and handle the aftermath.

t_ch: 不过，在诸位坠入「残卷」后的情况我无法观测，还请和我分享情报。
t_en: However, I wasn't able to directly observe your situation after you'd fallen into the "torn scroll." Would you be so kind as to share what happened there?

t_ch: 「新告死魔」一案，可以结案了。我的「影子」吞下了那三人，尝到了他们的罪业。
t_en: We can close the New Herald of Death case. My "shadow" has devoured the guilty three and tasted their sins.

t_ch: 他们犯下了共愿帮的灭门血案，这一点确凿无疑。
t_en: They were responsible for the Synwish Syndicate massacre. Of that I'm certain.

t_ch: 指使者，是满愿吗？
t_en: Was Fulwish the mastermind?

t_ch: 我没能从中找到相关的证据。不过就算找到了也没有意义，犯人已被处决了。
t_en: I couldn't find any solid proof of it, but it hardly matters now that the culprits have been executed.

t_ch: 无妨。汇总你和朽叶小姐行动所获的情报，我的推演已经成型：
t_en: Worry not. Based on the intel provided by you and Miss Kuchiba, I have deduced the following:

t_ch: 作为十五年前那场「血涂游戏」的幸存者，满愿成立了慈善团体「幸福微笑研究会」。
t_en: As a survivor of the tragedy of the "Bloodstained Games", Fulwish founded the "Research Society of Happy Smiles" charity organization.

t_ch: 长久以来，该组织为入会成员提供名为「幸福手术」的非法医疗方案，抹除其感知痛苦的生理机能，由此吸引了众多拥趸。
t_en: The organization has since been providing an unapproved medical treatment named "Happiness Surgery" to its members, which neutralizes their physiological capacity to feel pain. The procedure drew many more followers as a result.

t_ch: 而幸研会的成员「破晓战队」模仿告死魔犯案，并于展会期间向星穹列车发起了挑战。
t_en: And the Daybreak Squadron, members of the Smiles Society, imitated the Herald of Death's modus operandi for their crimes, and challenged the Astral Express during the exhibition.

t_ch: 在上述事实中，预测满愿身为指使者的概率是…<unbreak>92%</unbreak>。
t_en: From the aforementioned facts, the predicted probability of Fulwish being the mastermind is... <unbreak>92%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 请容我提醒您，真珠女士，二相乐园的管理决策应当由证据链而非概率推演决定。
t_en: If I may, Madam Pearl. Management in Planarcadia should be dictated by the chain of evidence rather than extrapolated probability.

t_ch: 我明白，我会遵守人类的法律与习俗。
t_en: I understand. I will observe the human laws and customs.

t_ch: 无论如何，我们通过这场「星铁FES」达成了目标：诱使心怀恶意的谒者浮出水面。
t_en: In any case, we have achieved our goal through Star Rail FEST: Luring the Supplicant with ill intent out of hiding.

t_ch: 破晓战队已经败了。
t_en: The Daybreak Squadron has been defeated.

t_ch: 满愿已经出局了。
t_en: It's the end of the line for Fulwish.

t_ch: 没错，但下回还是另请高明吧！
t_en: That's right, but please get someone else on the job next time!

t_ch: 各位一路奋战辛苦了，容我再次致歉。
t_en: You've all fought and worked hard. Please, allow me to apologize again.

t_ch: 既然这个满愿已经浮出了水面，咱们也把她的谒者击败了…那是不是该尽早把她抓起来？
t_en: Since Fulwish's exposed now, and we've defeated her Supplicant... shouldn't we hurry and arrest her as soon as possible?

t_ch: 事情恐怕没这么简单，我们击败了满愿派出的谒者，这一点确实没错。但是……
t_en: I'm afraid it's not that simple. We've defeated Fulwish's Supplicant, yes, however...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这三名破晓战士，通通是谒者。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>All three Daybreak Warriors were Supplicants.</color>

t_ch: 这不合理…谒者应当只有佩戴面具，受幻月认可踏入游戏的那一个才对。
t_en: That can't be... The Supplicant should be the only one who wore the mask and participated in the games with the Phantasmoon's blessing.

t_ch: 「影子」所吞之物，无法再有任何隐瞒和谎言。这三名破晓战士，每一人都曾佩戴过面具。
t_en: Those devoured by my "shadow" can no longer lie nor deceive. All three of them had worn the mask before.

t_ch: 如果他们都拥有谒者的身份，那就意味着…满愿还有继续介入游戏的余裕。
t_en: If they were all Supplicants... that means it's still possible for Fulwish to intervene in the games.

t_ch: 更令我毛骨悚然的是，在「影子」吞下他们三人的瞬间，我尝到了一股似曾相识的味道——
t_en: What's even more terrifying is, when the "shadow" devoured them, I caught a taste of something familiar...

t_ch: 那是我身为巡海游侠时，曾吞噬过的「丰饶」的滋味…
t_en: It was the taste of Abundance that I'd once devoured as a Galaxy Ranger...
...Wuh?

t_ch: 他们被「丰饶」转变了？
t_en: They were transformed by the Abundance?

t_ch: 嗯，我本以为这个世界不会疯到这个地步…但我错了。
t_en: Yes. I didn't think this world would go that far... but I was wrong.

t_ch: 你的影子，曾吞下过「丰饶」血肉？
t_en: Your shadow once ate the Abundance's flesh?

t_ch: 那已经是…很久很久以前的事了。
t_en: That's something that... happened a long, long time ago.

t_ch: 隐居生活，终究还是让人变迟钝了…我早该发觉的，可恶。
t_en: Living in seclusion dulls one's senses... I should've realized it earlier, darn it.

t_ch: 对这一行为隐含的风险等级评估——
t_en: Assessing the risk involved in this procedure...

t_ch: 自怨自艾毫无意义。所以，结论必须更正：幸研会所谓的「幸福手术」并不是单纯地抹去痛苦，而是一项与丰饶有关的医疗技术。
t_en: There is no point in beating yourself up over it. Therefore, the conclusion must be corrected: The Research Society's "Happiness Surgery" is a medical technology related to the Abundance, and not simply about relieving pain.

t_ch: ……………无法推演。
t_en: ...Unable to extrapolate.

t_ch: 爻光将军曾告知我们，她在占卜时预见二相乐园将面临一场巨大灾厄。按她的解读，星核猎手刃可能是这场灾难的起点。
t_en: General Yao Guang told us that she foresaw a great calamity upon Planarcadia. According to her divinations, Blade, the Stellaron Hunter, could be its catalyst.

t_ch: 难怪她曾向我索要引渡刃的权力。但也许超出我们所有人想象的是：二相乐园的灾劫早就悄然根植，远比星核猎手的到来要更早。
t_en: So that's why she asked me for the authority to extradite Blade. Regardless, none of us had anticipated this: Planarcadia's calamity had already taken root, long before the arrival of the Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 立刻对满愿重拳出击吧？
t_en: Then, let's strike Fulwish where it hurts?

t_ch: 是以公司的名义？以执法部门的名义？还是以谒者挑战的名义？
t_en: In the name of the IPC? The law? Or a challenge to a Supplicant?

t_ch: 那意味着三种截然不同的战术。无论选择哪条道路，都要考虑相应的时机与代价。
t_en: These options imply three different strategies. Regardless of the approach, the respective timing and investment must be considered.

t_ch: 满愿到底想做什么？
t_en: What does Fulwish really want?

t_ch: 她是想对早已死去的告死魔进行复仇吗…还是想抹去那段悲剧历史？
t_en: Does she want revenge against the long-dead Herald of Death?... Or is she trying to erase the memories of that tragedy?

t_ch: 揣测她的动机毫无意义。比起智械，人类可能因为一个疯狂的理由而不惜代价编织某个计划，而执行计划的每一步却又充满了无懈可击的理性。重要的是，阻止她。
t_en: It's frivolous to speculate her motives. Unlike Intellitrons, humans may weave an intricate plan for a mad reason at any cost, yet execute it with impeccable rationality at every step. What's important is that she is stopped.

t_ch: 不死途先生，感谢你带给我的「惊喜」情报。于无形中，你挽救了许多人的性命。
t_en: Thank you for your "surprise" intel, Mr. Ashveil. You have just saved many more lives.

t_ch: 由此刻起，「异常防御部」必须将满愿和幸研会的成员列入重点监视名单。基于满愿本人掌控着媒体，我希望更密切关注其发布信息的渠道。
t_en: Henceforth, the Department of Aberration Defense will place Fulwish and the members of the Research Society of Happy Smiles on a special watch list. Given Fulwish's control over media outlets, I recommend closer monitoring of her dissemination channels.

t_ch: 明白，同时我们也会按照《异常危害安全应对法》，以「祸」级标准进行灾前对策准备。
t_en: Understood. We will also implement pre-disaster measures at the Calamity-level standard per the Safety Response Protocol Against Aberrant Threats.

t_ch: 满愿绝非一人在行动。能令普通人获得丰饶转变，意味着在她背后还有其他怀有巨大恶意的支持者。那应该不是本土力量可以轻易抗衡的敌人……
t_en: Fulwish is not working alone. For normal people to be able to get an Abundance Transmutation, that implies far more sinister supporters behind the scenes. These are enemies not to be easily contended with...

t_ch: 在此，我以世界管理者的名义向各位郑重请求：请帮助二相乐园度过眼前的危机！
t_en: Therefore, as the Administrator, I beseech you all: Please, lend your aid and help Planarcadia through this crisis!

t_ch: 无关星神游戏的胜负，满愿的阴谋已跨过了界限——这比十五年前的告死魔事件严重百倍。
t_en: This has escalated beyond mere rivalry for the Aeonic game. Fulwish's conspiracy has crossed the line. This situation's a hundred times more dire than the Herald of Death incident fifteen years ago.

t_ch: 我不会允许那样的事情发生。
t_en: I won't allow something like that to happen.

t_ch: 我就知道，这趟度假绝不轻松。
t_en: I should have read the small print of this "vacation"...

t_ch: 斯科特的账，我要找她算算。
t_en: I have Skott's score to settle with her.

t_ch: 真珠小姐言重了，这里是我的故乡，我不会坐视十五年前的悲剧重演。更何况…眼前所面临的危机背后也许潜藏着更大的阴谋，作为无名客，我本就有义不容辞的责任。
t_en: Please, Madam Pearl. This is my home world, and I won't allow the tragedy to repeat itself. Besides, there may be an even greater conspiracy behind all this... As a Nameless, it is my duty to see it through to the end.

t_ch: …哼。新仇旧恨，确实该好好算算了。她玩弄生命的方式，还有那份血肉的味道…都需要一次彻底的清算。
t_en: ...Hmph. Indeed, there are old scars and fresh wounds to settle. For the way she toys with life, and the taste of that flesh... Fulwish must be held accountable once and for all.

t_ch: 感激不尽。这份共同进退的情谊，我会铭记于心。那么……
t_en: You have my eternal gratitude. I won't forget this bond from our shared trials. Now then...

t_ch: 我会着手开始制定计划，同时，我也会将相关情报和爻光将军分享——满愿种下的丰饶之种，必须尽快连根拔起。
t_en: I shall prepare an action plan as well as share relevant information with General Yao Guang. The Seed of Abundance planted by Fulwish must be uprooted and eradicated as soon as possible.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，还有什么想问的吗？
t_en: Is there something else I can help you with, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 幸研会发展了这么多年…
t_en: The Smiles Society has been around for a while...

t_ch: 我明白，你想问：幸研会发展成如今的样子，难道你们对此毫无察觉？
t_en: I understand. Your inquiry: How did they manage to operate for so many years unnoticed?

t_ch: 你之前对幸研会毫无察觉吗？
t_en: How are you unaware of what they've been doing?

t_ch: 我曾因部分地区的犯罪率显著降低，而将幸研会列入短期观察。
t_en: I had put them on a temporary watch list before, due to significant decreases in crime rates in certain regions.

t_ch: 但现在我们都知道了，他们是通过什么手法创造这一奇迹的。
t_en: But now, we finally know how they achieved such a miracle.

t_ch: 仅以我个人视角而言，我无法苛责那些加入幸研会的公民，也不想追究当时管理者的过失。
t_en: Personally speaking, I cannot fault the citizens who joined the Society, nor do I wish to fixate on the accountability of those who governed at the time.

t_ch: 毕竟对群体而言，幸研会是维持稳定的称手工具。而对会众来说，逃避痛苦是人类的天性。
t_en: After all, for the corporation, the Smiles Society is a tool for maintaining stability, and the members are simply following the human instinct to avoid suffering.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你去过匹诺康尼，应当知晓：在那里，家族成员会以「同谐」的力量催人入梦，安抚人们的痛苦。从人类伦理上来说，适度的逃避痛苦是无可厚非的权利。
t_en: You've been to Penacony, {NICKNAME}. You should know: There, {M#the}{F#The} Family's members lull guests to sleep with power of the Harmony and soothe their pain. From a human ethics point of view, it is well within people's rights to avert pain in moderation.

t_ch: 人类无法像智械一样关闭与生俱来的{RUBY_B#痛苦、焦虑}「负反馈」{RUBY_E#}，我深深理解并同情这一点。
t_en: Humans cannot turn off their innate {RUBY_B#pain and anxiety}"negative feedback"{RUBY_E#} like Intellitrons do. I understand and deeply sympathize with that.

t_ch: 作为一名智械，我被分配的母题是「解析艺术」。但同时，我又有幸得到了治理这个世界的任命。
t_en: My assigned theme is "Analytical Art." But at the same time, I am fortunate to be appointed governor of a world.

t_ch: 在人类的艺术作品中，对痛苦的描绘与升华，是最为璀璨的瑰宝之一。悲剧、挽歌，还有失落的史诗…它们震撼灵魂的伟力，来自于人类对「负反馈」的深刻理解。
t_en: The portrayal and sublimation of pain in human works of art shine among humanity's greatest treasures. Tragedy, elegy, and lost epics... Their soul-stirring power springs from a profound understanding of this "negative feedback."

t_ch: 所谓的「幸福手术」，抹去的不仅仅是人类痛苦的感知。它篡改了人类的复杂性，将人类这幅斑斓的画作简化成了单一的色块。
t_en: This so-called "Happiness Surgery" does more than just obliterate people's perception of pain. It strips away human complexity, and turns what was dynamic and brilliant into a monotonous blotch.

t_ch: 对我来说，管理世界即是作画——维持其上生命形态的丰富与演化潜力。幸研会亵渎了我的作品。
t_en: To me, governing this world is like creating a painting. My vision is to maintain the diversity of lifeforms and preserve their potential for growth and change. The Research Society has disrespected my work.

t_ch: 因此，我的职责与母题在此刻合为一题：我会尽我所能清除幸研会在这片土地上留下的错笔。
t_en: Thus, my duty and theme have become one and the same: I will do all that I can to cleanse the misguided strokes of the Research Society from this land.

t_ch: 再次感谢你们愿意伸出援手，无名客。接下来，我将开始进行之后的决策推演。
t_en: Thank you again for lending your aid, Nameless. I will begin extrapolation of our next steps now.

t_ch: 我还想和在场的各位聊聊。
t_en: I want to go over things with everyone else.

t_ch: 请各位自便。
t_en: Please, be my guest.

t_ch: 告辞了，真珠女士。
t_en: See you later, Madam Pearl.

t_ch: 望诸位能在行动前好好休息。
t_en: I hope you all get some proper rest before moving out again.

t_ch: 真抱歉啊，无名客。你的展会，你的敌人，最后我却抢了你的风头。
t_en: Terribly sorry, Nameless. It was your exhibition and your enemies, and there I was, stealing your spotlight.

t_ch: 真好奇，我这一回出场到底能给这张面具攒下多少愿力呢……
t_en: Curious. I wonder how much Wishpower my appearance this time accumulates for the mask...

t_ch: 完全听不出一点歉意。
t_en: You don't sound sorry at all.

t_ch: 咱们这梁子算是结下了。
t_en: I'll remember this.

t_ch: 算了，想让你得意一下吧。
t_en: Fine. You can have this one for free.

t_ch: 别这样嘛，你可以对外宣称我是「瓦尔特」，反正我们俩的造型差不离。也许听到这个，民众的愿力就会流入你的「户头」里也说不定。
t_en: Oh, don't be like that. You can tell them that I'm Welt. We already look similar enough. Who knows? Maybe that'll redirect some Wishpower toward your "account" instead?

t_ch: 你和仙舟打过交道吗？
t_en: Have you had dealings with Xianzhou before?

t_ch: 并肩作战过，也认识几个熟人。不过你懂，蜜月期总不会太久。
t_en: We fought side by side in the past, and I know a few faces. But as they say, the honeymoon phase never lasts.

t_ch: 我上一次进入冷冻休眠前，还听说他们的人在找我。你可要替我保密啊。
t_en: I heard some of theirs were still looking for me before I went into my last cryosleep. Ahem... I'm counting on you to keep this a secret.

t_ch: 你为什么要隐藏身份？
t_en: Why are you going incognito?

t_ch: 有人想要我脖子上的脑袋，有人想要我手臂里的影子。
t_en: Some people want the head on my shoulders, while others want the shadow in my arm.

t_ch: 人老了，只想图个清静，就这么简单。
t_en: I'm old, and I just want some peace and quiet. That's all there is to it.

t_ch: 你会继续参加幻月游戏？
t_en: Will you continue participating in the Phantasmoon Games?

t_ch: 怎么，迫不及待想要把我当对手给料理了？没这么心急吧？
t_en: What, itching to get rid of me already? You're not that hasty, are you?

t_ch: 眼下有个更庞大的猎物在蠢蠢欲动——或许不比你过去的敌人强大，但论歹毒，说不定更甚一筹。
t_en: An even greater prey just joined the game. Sure, she could be small fry by your standards, but in terms of viciousness, she might surprise you yet.

t_ch: 在谒者分道扬镳前，满愿绝对是个值得大家团结一致狩猎的好目标。
t_en: Before the Supplicants go their separate ways, Fulwish is definitely a good hunting target for us to align our goals.

t_ch: 我会击败满愿的。
t_en: I will defeat Fulwish.

t_ch: 这一次，别抢我风头。
t_en: Don't steal my spotlight this time.

t_ch: 我要替斯科特报仇。
t_en: I will avenge Skott.

t_ch: 这自信的眼神，还真是…让人忍不住嘴角上翘啊。
t_en: Such confidence... Heh, can't help but smile at that.

t_ch: 不知道为什么，你让我想起一个叫铁尔南的小伙子。你们这些无名客，就爱往火烧得最旺的地方跳对吧？
t_en: For some reason, you really remind me of a young man named Tiernan. You Nameless bunch just love jumping headfirst into fire pits, don't you?

t_ch: 看你身手不错，在幻月游戏结束后，如果还活着，有没有兴趣加入巡海游侠？
t_en: Well, given your skills, would you be interested in joining the Galaxy Rangers if you're still alive by the time the Phantasmoon Games conclude?

t_ch: 我永远是星穹列车的一员。
t_en: I will always be a part of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 不错的回答。是我冒昧了，毕竟成为游侠，意味着失去、痛苦和复仇。
t_en: Good answer. I apologize for my presumptuousness. After all, becoming a Ranger comes with loss, suffering, and vengeance.

t_ch: 你不是早就隐退了吗？
t_en: I thought you'd retired?

t_ch: 问得好，看到有潜力的苗子，想拉人入伙的老毛病犯了。
t_en: Good question. I guess old habits die hard when I see someone with potential.

t_ch: 成为游侠也不是什么吸引人的事情。毕竟，那条路意味着失去、痛苦和复仇。
t_en: Being a Ranger holds little appeal, really. It is a path of loss, suffering, and vengeance.

t_ch: 我更想追随铁尔南的脚步。
t_en: I'd rather follow Tiernan's example.

t_ch: 铁尔南也是我敬重的列车前辈，我会追随他的脚步前进的。
t_en: Tiernan is also a senior member of the Express that I respect. I will follow in his footsteps.

t_ch: 冒昧了。成为游侠也不是什么吸引人的事情。毕竟，那条路意味着失去、痛苦和复仇。
t_en: Forgive me for being presumptuous. Being a Ranger holds little appeal, really. It is a path of loss, suffering, and vengeance.

t_ch: 那让我收回刚才的话，年轻人，祝你永远无需踏上游侠的道路。
t_en: In that case, I will take back my words. Young Nameless, may you never have to tread the path of a Ranger.

t_ch: …所以，真的是队长他们杀害了共愿帮的人，满愿小姐也在暗中谋划什么可怕的事情……
t_en: ...So it's true, the captain and the rest really did kill all those people from the Synwish Syndicate. Miss Fulwish is also plotting something terrible...

t_ch: 真荒谬。我的人生简直像是最离谱的噩梦里才会梦见的东西…从十五年前开始，到现在。
t_en: This is absurd. It's been fifteen years since my life turned into a montage of nightmarish amalgams... and it's still going.

t_ch: 你需要好好休息。
t_en: You need to rest.

t_ch: 剩下的事情，交给我吧。
t_en: Let me handle the rest.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}前辈，谢谢你。不死途先生说的对，这和舞台上扮演英雄…不一样。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Mr. Ashveil is right. This is... not the same as playing the hero on a stage.

t_ch: 到头来，我…只是个演员啊。
t_en: In the end I... I'm just an actor.

t_ch: 要走了吗，{NICKNAME}？接下来的事情就拜托你了，列车的英雄。
t_en: Leaving now, {NICKNAME}? We're counting on you, hero of the Express.

t_ch: 你倒是一点也不紧张。
t_en: You look fairly relaxed about it all.

t_ch: 因为我见多识广。翻开史料记录，刨除神话时代，哪一次幻月游戏不是一地鸡毛？
t_en: Because it's just another Phantasmoon Games for me. Check the records in the Ministry, and you'll see. Save the mythological times, they always end up in a huge mess, without fail.

t_ch: 也许阿哈设计这场游戏的目的，正是为了看人类毫无必要地给自己和同胞的命运加点料，要不然祂会死于整个宇宙无聊的运转。
t_en: Maybe that's precisely why Aha designed it this way, so THEY can watch humanity stumble over arbitrary obstacles we impose on ourselves and others. Otherwise, THEY'd probably die from the boredom of an orderly universe.

t_ch: 你们会怎么处置灰烬？
t_en: How will you deal with Cinderborne?

t_ch: 也许会审讯个好几天，打上个强光灯，让他睡不好吃不香，然后他应该就会说说自己知道的幸研会内幕。
t_en: Maybe interrogate him for a few days. Get a strong light, render him unable to eat or sleep well, and he will probably spill everything he knows about the Smiles Society.

t_ch: 等什么都挖不出来，就放了他。
t_en: And once we've picked his brain, we'll let him go.

t_ch: 我得走了，朽叶小姐。
t_en: I should go, Miss Kuchiba.

t_ch: 时间差不多了，我也该去办正经事了。
t_en: It's almost time. I should get back to work too.

t_ch: 我杵在这儿，不是为了当个摆件。
t_en: You know, I'm not here to be an ornament.

t_ch: 判断：你有话想问我，不死途先生。
t_en: Assessment: You have something to ask me, Mr. Ashveil.

t_ch: 这段日子，我总觉得自己的行动格外幸运。满愿也好，真弘也罢，线索就像自己长了腿，一个个地往我跟前靠。
t_en: Lately, I've been on an extremely lucky streak. Be it Fulwish or Magnus, the leads practically gained sentience and came to me one by one.

t_ch: 运气也是实力最重要的一部分，不是吗？
t_en: Luck is also an important part of one's toolkit. Wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: 我在想，这一切都是你干的吧？派我去调查幸研会，保护星穹列车，最终将一切导向让我解放影子吞掉那几人…以验证你对幸研会的猜想。
t_en: I'm beginning to think you're the one behind it all. You tasked me to investigate the Society and protect the Astral Express, which all led to me unleashing my shadow on those people... just so you can confirm your hypothesis.

t_ch: ——这一切，都是你安排的，对吧？
t_en: ...You had everything planned out since the beginning, hadn't you?

t_ch: 如果我说「是」，会伤到你的自尊心吗？
t_en: If I answer "Yes," would it wound your ego?

t_ch: …也许吧。
t_en: ...Perhaps.

t_ch: 是。是我为你铺平了调查的路，让你笔直走到了疑犯面前。
t_en: Yes. I paved the way for your investigation, leading you straight to the suspects.

t_ch: 透过你，我证实了自己对幸研会的猜想。但「丰饶转变」这个答案，仍令我感到棘手。
t_en: Through you, I confirmed my suspicions about the Research Society. However, the question of Abundance Transformation remains a thorny issue for me.

t_ch: 好在，二相乐园隐居着一位隐退许久的游侠之首，他对处理这类凶煞孽物很有经验。
t_en: Fortunately, there's a ranger who specializes in confronting such abominations, having lived in long seclusion within Planarcadia.
Hmph...

t_ch: 但你是知道的，封印在我手臂中的「影子」…那东西实在很危险。
t_en: But you know the "shadow" sealed inside my arm... can be very dangerous.

t_ch: 光是拔出钉子，「残卷」和裂隙就和它产生了共鸣，躁动了起来。
t_en: Simply removing the nail can cause it to stir and resonate with {RUBY_B#"torn scroll"}the fragment{RUBY_E#} and fissure.

t_ch: 如果当时我没能制住它，这场战斗会把我们所有人葬送在那个深不见底的空间里——真珠，这也是你想要的吗？
t_en: Had I not kept it under control at that time, the fight would have ended with all of us buried in that bottomless abyss. Is that part of your plans too, Pearl?

t_ch: 人类会为更坏的假设而恐惧。但对智械而言，那是非理性的干扰。
t_en: Humans fear the worst, but to the Intellitrons, such fears are merely irrational deterrents.

t_ch: 我交给你的那张「欢愉假面」，不是已经给予了你足够力量钉住那道「影子」了吗？
t_en: Wasn't the Mask of Elation I gave you enough to pin down the "shadow"?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——那位列车领航员…「观星者」我见指点你寻获的「馈赠」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That Gift you found through the guidance of the Express Navigator, "Starseer", Isee.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——那道在十个琥珀纪前，吞下过虫群与绝灭大君「诛罗」的影子。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That very shadow that devoured the Swarm and Lord Ravager Zulo ten Amber Eras ago.</color>

t_ch: 你赌赢了。你知道的也实在不少。
t_en: You won the bet. You sure know a lot about this.

t_ch: 我必须纠正你：我的伦理观念不允许我以人类的性命进行概率游戏。所以，我一直以来的习惯是：掌握最充分的信息，确保万无一失。
t_en: Please allow me to correct you. My ethical parameters prohibit engagement in probabilistic gambits. Accordingly, I operate by acquiring sufficient information to ensure zero margin for error.

t_ch: 毕竟，你们是开创了「艺术」这一形式的种族。即便在最无知的人类的意识中，依然蕴有创造的种籽。为此，我怜爱、羡慕你们。
t_en: Then again, you are the species that brought "art" into existence as a form of expression. That seed of creation exists even in the most ignorant of humans' minds, and for that, I love and admire you.

t_ch: 无论你相信与否，拉曼查先生，我会遵守你我之间最初的协议：在幻月游戏胜利之刻，我会免除你曾受的一切苦楚，达成你的心愿——
t_en: Whether you believe or not, I will honor our initial agreement, Mr. La Mancha. At the moment of victory in the Phantasmoon Games, I will free you from all sufferings and fulfill your wish—

t_ch: 「令一位巡海游侠安然老死床榻」。
t_en: "To let a Galaxy Ranger die peacefully in his bed."

t_ch: 那么，我将继续为你奋战，女士。
t_en: In that case, I will continue to fight for you, my lady.

t_ch: 啊，对了。
t_en: Oh, right.

t_ch: 你一直说自己想复现绘世的创作，我是不太懂艺术之类的玩意啊……
t_en: You mentioned several times wanting to replicate the works of Graphia. I don't know much about art...

t_ch: 但我在想，今天封印那些裂隙时，你落下的每一笔虽然并无艺术性可言，但对这个世界的人们来说……
t_en: But I was considering that, despite the lack of artistic quality in your strokes when sealing those fissures today, to the people of this world...

t_ch: 你刚才的创作绝不比绘世的画作拙劣。因为在今天，没有一个无辜的人死去，是你成功保护了他们。
t_en: Your creation is just as important as the works of Graphia. Not a single innocent soul was lost on this day because of your protection.

t_ch: 遥想烬土纪元时的那位画师之祖，她在创造画中世界时，难道会在意手中挥出每一笔的艺术价值吗？
t_en: Looking back to the ancestral painter of the Cindearth Age, do you truly think she cared about the artistic value of each stroke when she created World in Canvas?

t_ch: 啧，我在胡说什么呢…一点艺术门外汉的锐评，别放心上。我走了！
t_en: Tsk, but what do I know... These are just crude observations from an amateur, so pay them no mind. I'll be on my way!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——那道在数百年前，吞下了丰饶令使「倏忽」的影子。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That very shadow that devoured Shuhu, the Emanator of Abundance, hundreds of years ago.</color>

t_ch: 感觉，经历了好不真实的一天。
t_en: This entire day has felt... unreal.

t_ch: 事情一件一件地发生，需要解决的危机也越来越大。
t_en: We had situations lined up one after another, and a growing crisis on our hands.

t_ch: 幸研会竟然真的疯狂到了染指丰饶的力量。也不知到底有多少人接受了「幸福手术」……
t_en: The Research Society is insane to meddle with the power of Abundance. There's no telling how many have already undergone the Happiness Surgery...

t_ch: 满愿，明明她也亲眼目睹了告死魔带来的惨剧，但十五年后，她却成为了新告死魔的制造者。
t_en: Fulwish witnessed the tragedy caused by the Herald of Death fifteen years ago, and now she herself has assumed that dreadful mantle.

t_ch: 我们得尽快将情报告诉丹恒、星期日和爻光将军。
t_en: We have to relay this information to Dan Heng, Sunday, and General Yao Guang as soon as possible.

t_ch: 满愿真的以为自己能赢？
t_en: Does Fulwish really think she could win?

t_ch: 她是在向这个世界宣战。
t_en: Fulwish is declaring war against this world.

t_ch: 自己究竟在面对什么样的敌人，满愿不可能不清楚这一点。
t_en: Fulwish is definitely aware of the enemies she's facing.

t_ch: 事到如今，我们更要赢得谒见阿哈的机会，至少要阻止她赢得游戏的胜利。
t_en: That is why we must win an audience with Aha. At the very least, we need to stop Fulwish from winning the game.

t_ch: 是啊，要是幸福微笑研究会成功了…光是想想就觉得那画面很可怕。
t_en: Yeah. The thought of the Research Society of Happy Smiles going through with their plan gives me the chills...

t_ch: 忙碌了一天，大家应该都累了，抓紧这短暂的和平时间，好好休息一下吧。我要先回列车和瓦尔特汇合了，小三月、{NICKNAME}，你们呢？
t_en: It's been a long day, and all of you must be very tired. Take this chance to get some proper rest. I'll go meet Welt back on the Express. March, {NICKNAME}, what about you?

t_ch: 疲惫的时刻，最好的充电方式就是虚度时间，我先留在外面呼吸点新鲜空气吧。
t_en: The best way to recharge is to waste time, so I'm staying outside for some fresh air.

t_ch: 正好，我也想在街头转转。
t_en: Sounds good. I was thinking of heading to the streets for a walk.

t_ch: ——真的，刚才月亮发笑了——我只是来凑凑热闹的——你听错了吧？
t_en: I wasn't kidding. The moon was laughing... I'm just here to join the fun... I bet you misheard it...

t_ch: 发生什么了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 快看，天上的月亮…好像确实有点不对劲！
t_en: Look at the moon in the sky... Something is definitely wrong with it!

t_ch: 喂喂，地上的聪明人和笨蛋们，小朋友和大朋友们，愚者和伶人们，大家能听见吗？
t_en: Hey there! All the smarties and dummies, children and adults, Fools and entertainers, can you all hear me?

t_ch: …我就说嘛，占卜所得这个世界异于常情的「凶命」，一定是有解释的。
t_en: ...I knew it. There must be an explanation for the unusual fate of this world.

t_ch: 循踪失雀影，得窥灵木春。多亏了这只小鸟，这不就找到了幻月游戏的根柢所在了吗？
t_en: Though I lost sight of the sparrow, I discovered a mysterious tree. I've finally found the heart of the Phantasmoon Games, thanks to this little birdie.

t_ch: （星期日先生，你能感应到我吗？）
t_en: (Mr. Sunday, do you sense me?)

t_ch: 这鸟儿到底是怎么了，毫无反应？
t_en: There's no reaction from the bird. What's wrong with it?

t_ch: 喂，有人吗？来个人好吗？
t_en: Hello? Is anyone there? Can I get somebody here?

t_ch: 没人——没人——
t_en: No one's here... No one—

t_ch: 骗人，我明明透过鸟儿的眼睛瞧见这儿躲着个漂亮姑娘啊。你是谁？
t_en: That's a lie. I saw a pretty girl hiding right here through the bird's eyes. Who are you?

t_ch: 与你无关——与你无关——
t_en: That's none of your business... None of your business...

t_ch: 既然这样，那就别怪本座说话不客气了。
t_en: If that's how it's going to be, then I'm done playing nice here.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>如果我所见无误，扎根在此的这株古木，应该就是丰饶「建木」吧？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If my eyes weren't playing tricks on me, the ancient tree here must be the Ambrosial Arbor of Abundance, yes?</color>

t_ch: 小姑娘，要继续躲起来装神弄鬼，还是好好出来和我谈谈？
t_en: Little girl, are you going to keep playing hide-and-seek, or will you come out and have a proper conversation with me?

t_ch: 「异常防御部」的人三天两头地往这儿跑，记录游戏进展也就罢了。现在连我的行藏都被无关的外人发现了…我想，我真的应该搬家了。
t_en: The Department of Aberration Defense often comes here to record game progress, and now my movements have been exposed to complete outsiders... I suppose it's time to leave.

t_ch: 你这人说话口气凶巴巴的，但念在你眼光不坏，能一眼瞧出我来历的份上，我就好好同你聊上几句。
t_en: You sound unpleasant to talk to, but since you have eyes keen enough to tell what I am at a glance, I'll have a short chat with you.

t_ch: 我可以回答你三个问题，开口问吧，三个问题一过，我就要动手逐客咯。
t_en: I will answer three questions, so ask away. Once you have your answers, I'm going to show you the door.

t_ch: 我本想问…为何{RUBY_B#阿哈}常乐天君{RUBY_E#}会默许一株丰饶建木在祂所赐福的世界里生根发芽，但料想以祂百无禁忌的性格，也没什么允不允许的。
t_en: I wanted to question why the {RUBY_B#Aha}Joyseeker{RUBY_E#} would permit the Ambrosial Arbor of Abundance to take root in a world they had blessed, but given their carefree nature, there was probably never any restriction to begin with.

t_ch: 那么第二个问题，你究竟是这哈托彼亚土生土长的灵物，还是…由建木赋形点化的长生种？
t_en: On my second question, are you a Faekind native to Ahatopia, or are you... one of the long-life species shaped by the Ambrosial Arbor?

t_ch: 你不是很擅长卜卦望气嘛，能替我看看吗？我头上悬着的签是吉是凶？
t_en: Aren't you good at divination? Can you help me take a look whether the slip on my head says weal or woe?

t_ch: 你的头顶除了那对耳朵，空无一物。
t_en: There's nothing on your head except your ears.

t_ch: 这就是答案。
t_en: And that itself is the answer.

t_ch: 我是主持「幻月游戏」胜负的仲裁者。我是这世界上汹涌的欢欣之力，亦是它的生命脉动本身。
t_en: I am the arbitrator who determines the outcome of the Phantasmoon Games. I am the raging waves of joy and the living pulse of this world.

t_ch: 仙舟的卜者，你所见吉凶，不过是我掌中飘落的一瓣落花——朝生暮死，转瞬成尘。而真正的我，乃是容纳这「一瞬」与「永恒」的…镇世神木。
t_en: Diviner of the Xianzhou, the weal and woe you behold are but a single petal fallen from my hand. It blooms with the morning and withers by evening, reducing to dust in a fleeting moment. My true form is the Panarch Elwood, the embodiment of "instant" and "eternity."

t_ch: 有趣，想出这些词儿花了不少时间吧。
t_en: Interesting. Took you quite some time to come up with those words, huh?

t_ch: 创造我的那家伙说了，这些话说出来多半没人会信。啧，还真被祂说中了……
t_en: The one who created me did say most people wouldn't believe me. Tch, turns out THEY were right...

t_ch: 我信。我和你同病相怜。因为卜者的话，从来也是信者寥寥。何况你的额顶并未悬着吉凶签，这意味着——你的命数超越凡人的吉凶之变。自打来到这儿，我已见着一例。
t_en: I believe you. I feel the same way, for many do not trust the words of a diviner. Besides, no weal or woe has befallen you, which means your fate cannot be determined like that of ordinary mortals. You're not the first one I've met with this condition since my arrival here.

t_ch: 你还剩下最后一个问题。
t_en: You're left with one question.

t_ch: 既然你自认是丰饶孽物…那是否该好好解释一下，这个世界居民头上所悬的凶命……
t_en: Since you admit to being an abomination of Abundance... Shouldn't you explain the fate of this world's residents...?

t_ch: …莫非是你的手笔？若你口吐的答案不能教我信服——
t_en: ...Unless they are your doing? If your answer fails to convince me...

t_ch: 等我一支帝弓箭符召来天上的光矢，一切可就来不及咯？
t_en: It may be too late by the time I summon the Lux Arrow from the sky with the Reignbow.

t_ch: 冷静，冷静！这样的玩笑可开不得。
t_en: Chill out! You shouldn't make jokes like this.

t_ch: 我没你这般能掐会算的本事，你突然说起什么大吉大凶的事，又问这问那的，我也很茫然啊……
t_en: I'm not as skilled at divination as you are. When you suddenly speak of the great weal or woe and interrogate me, I get confused too...

t_ch: 毕竟，这「幻月游戏」背后的种种规则、变数，不都是某位神明一时兴起的结果嘛……
t_en: After all, isn't every rule and every variable of the Phantasmoon Games dictated by the impulse of some god?

t_ch: 要说眼下这风雨欲来的局势…我们不妨好好聊聊——
t_en: As for the brewing storm... let's settle down and discuss...

t_ch: ——会不会是某个混蛋乐子神又唯恐天下不乱了？
t_en: Whether the turmoil once again is the result of the Laughter's mischief?

t_ch: 片刻后，城市的某个角落……
t_en: Moments later, in some corner of the city...

t_ch: 又见面了啊，不死神探。
t_en: We meet again, Ashen Detective.

t_ch: 我也实在很难相信自己居然会回头找你，尤其是在知道你想把我卖给真珠后……
t_en: It's hard to believe that I came back for you, especially after learning that you wanted to sell me out to Pearl...

t_ch: 感谢大自然的馈赠，行走的六十一亿赏金又出现了。
t_en: Gotta thanks nature's gift. The <unbreak>6.1</unbreak> billion credits reward has appeared again.

t_ch: 幸好，我跳过了你这中间商，和那个智械达成交易了。很遗憾，我现在的悬赏是，零。
t_en: Fortunately, I bypassed you and struck a deal with that Intellitron instead. Regrettably, my current bounty stands at zero.

t_ch: 你每次都会把上门的主顾卖给警方吗？真是把路走窄了，难怪客人那么少。
t_en: Do you always turn your customers over to the police? How impressively short-sighted. No wonder your clientele is so small.

t_ch: 论把路走窄，谁也比不上为「命运的奴隶」奔走的星核猎手，不是吗？你们可是一条道奔着「终末」的方向，谁都拉不回来啊。
t_en: Speaking of short-sightedness, no one rivals the Stellaron Hunters, a.k.a. Destiny's Slaves, isn't it? You are all fated to march toward the Finality, and nothing can stop you.

t_ch: 恰恰相反，我们的路有许多条——只要{RUBY_B#艾利欧}那家伙{RUBY_E#}看得见。
t_en: On the contrary, there are many paths for us, as long as {RUBY_B#Elio}that person{RUBY_E#} can see.

t_ch: 也就是说，这趟行动，他看不见你们在这个世界的命运轨迹？
t_en: In other words, he can't see the trajectory of your destiny in this world during this mission?

t_ch: 你猜？
t_en: Take a guess.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的消息我听说了。「列神之战」已成不可避免的定局…公司也好，列车也罢，都在为这无法预测的未来奔走。
t_en: I've heard what befell Amphoreus. The war among the Aeons is now inevitable... Whether it's the IPC or the Express, they are fighting for an uncertain future.

t_ch: 而在这个被欢愉瞩目的世界里，也将面临不止一位星神的干涉。所以，就连命运的奴隶也无法看清前路。
t_en: And in the world where the Elation is the Center of Attention, there will eventually be more than one Aeon interfering. Even a Destiny's Slave would not be able to see the path ahead.

t_ch: 接着猜，很接近了。
t_en: Keep guessing. We're getting pretty close.

t_ch: 猜个屁，要我说这颗星球立刻改名亚德丽芬还来得及。
t_en: Enough of your games. I'd say it's not too late to rename the planet Adlivun.

t_ch: 别这么绝望嘛，大叔。我可是有备而来的…但我也需要人搭把手。
t_en: It's still too early to despair, old man. I came prepared... but I could use a helping hand.

t_ch: 三千万信用点，先款后活。
t_en: <unbreak>30</unbreak> million credits. Pay or die.

t_ch: 不是吧，看在老朋友的面子上，打个折呗。0信用点，如何？
t_en: Come on, give your friend a discount, will you? Say... zero credits?

t_ch: 谁和你是老朋友！
t_en: I ain't your friend.

t_ch: 我说的老朋友，是他。
t_en: I meant him.

t_ch: 应星，好久不见了。
t_en: It's been a while, Yingxing.

t_ch: 太久了，拉曼查先生。
t_en: It's been too long, Mr. La Mancha.

t_ch: ——我真的听见了——是你听错了吧？
t_en: No, I heard it... You must have misheard...

t_ch: 哎，我已经累得连凑热闹的劲儿都没了，你要是想玩就去吧，我在这儿等你。
t_en: Hey, I'm too tired to join in the fun. Go ahead if you want to play. I'll wait here for you.

t_ch: 怎么回事？
t_en: What's happening?

t_ch: 满愿背后的支持者…这场幻月游戏，或许早就被更危险的人物盯上了。
t_en: Fulwish's partner.... Perhaps someone far more dangerous has already set their sights on this round of the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 哎，来者不善啊。
t_en: Oh no, they are definitely up to no good.

t_ch: 系统时间<unbreak>23</unbreak>时<unbreak>47</unbreak>分<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒，你很准时，卡芙卡。
t_en: <unbreak>23</unbreak>:<unbreak>47</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak> system time. Very punctual, Kafka.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#星核猎手}艾利欧{RUBY_E#}看见的未来是不会出错的。刚刚的爆炸是怎么回事，这也在他的「剧本」里吗？
t_en: {RUBY_B#Stellaron Hunter}Elio{RUBY_E#} always tells the exact future. So what's with the explosion just now? Was that also part of his script?

t_ch: 在，「系统时间<unbreak>23</unbreak>时<unbreak>44</unbreak>分<unbreak>59</unbreak>秒，爆炸产生的脉冲造成了主控系统的大面积瘫痪。」
t_en: Uh-huh — "<unbreak>23</unbreak>:<unbreak>44</unbreak>:<unbreak>59</unbreak> system time: The pulses from the explosion cause a massive breakdown from the master control system."

t_ch: 是你做的？
t_en: You did that?

t_ch: 「反物质军团」干的，它们在两个系统时前全面入侵了空间站。
t_en: No, the Antimatter Legion did it. They completely invaded the space station two system hours ago.

t_ch: 我们需要和军团交手么？
t_en: *whistle* Alright, so do we need to fight the Legion?

t_ch: 不知道，艾利欧没有说，那这件事就不重要。
t_en: I dunno. Elio didn't say anything about it, so it doesn't matter.

t_ch: 明白了～那么从现在开始，行动由我接手。
t_en: Got it. So from now on, I'll be in charge of this operation.

t_ch: 收到。这次能让我玩得开心点吗？之前的几次行动都很无聊呢。
t_en: Copy. Can you let me have some fun this time? Our last few operations turned out to be pretty dull.

t_ch: 抱歉，今天的任务非常枯燥：仅仅是把目标「放进去」而已。
t_en: ...Sorry, I'm afraid there's not much I can do for you — our task this time is just to "place" the target properly.

t_ch: ——但想要找什么乐子，我都不会拦着你。毕竟……
t_en: But if you wanna go look for some fun yourself, I won't stop you. I mean, after all...

t_ch: 这空间站的主人是黑塔吧？那个「天才俱乐部」第<unbreak>83</unbreak>席。她的防御系统好对付么？
t_en: So the owner of this space station is Herta, No. <unbreak>83</unbreak> of the Genius Society, right? Is her security system easy to crack?

t_ch: 有一点点棘手。但「军团」的入侵让这儿的主控系统瘫痪了几分钟，省了我不少工夫。
t_en: Not really. But the Legion's invasion paralyzed the master control system for a few minutes, which was a big help.

t_ch: 既然被星神「{RUBY_B#纳努克}毁灭{RUBY_E#}」盯上了，这座空间站的寿命也快到头了。
t_en: I guess this space station is about to meet its doom now that it's become a target of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Nanook}Destruction{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 到头不了，这任务还有后续…你都不看「剧本」么？
t_en: ...No, it isn't. There's a sequel to this mission... You didn't read the script?

t_ch: 你知道我的，我讨厌按别人的步调做事。艾利欧也知道，所以他只会告诉我哪些是不能做的。
t_en: ...You know me, I hate being told what to do. Elio knows this too, so he normally just tells me what's off-limits.

t_ch: 比如？
t_en: Like what?

t_ch: 比如干掉这儿的所有人。
t_en: Like wiping this place out.

t_ch: 好啦好啦，你把它丢哪去了，银狼？
t_en: *sigh* Yeah, yeah. Where did you send it, Silver Wolf?

t_ch: 随手打的坐标，没什么讲究。你很关心那只虚卒的去向吗？
t_en: Some random coordinates, not important. You care about where that Voidranger ended up?

t_ch: 不关心啊～只是不管看几次我都会想，你的手段还真是不可思议~
t_en: Of course not~ I'm just amazed at this fancy technique of yours, as usual.

t_ch: 修改现实数据而已，不值一提的小把戏。
t_en: Just a little trick of tampering with the data of reality, I wouldn't call it fancy.

t_ch: 你刚刚看什么东西那么津津有味？也给我瞧瞧？
t_en: What were you looking at so intently just now? Let me see.

t_ch: 黑塔的玩具，空间站收藏的「奇物」目录。里边有很多有趣的东西。
t_en: Herta's toys, a catalog featuring the space station's collection of rare items. They've got a lot of interesting gadgets.

t_ch: 比如？
t_en: Like what?

t_ch: 有一把枪，能给它准星里出现的生物打分，从0到<unbreak>100</unbreak>不等。
t_en: There's this gun, it can rate any creature within its crosshair as a score from 0 to <unbreak>100</unbreak>.

t_ch: …这哪里有趣了。
t_en: ...Doesn't sound very interesting.

t_ch: 你不好奇自己会得多少分吗？…我还挺想知道的。
t_en: Aren't you curious about how much you would score? I kinda wanna know mine.

t_ch: 好啊，要是顺路的话就去玩一下吧～目标地点在哪儿？
t_en: Fine, I guess we can swing by and play with it if it's not too far. What's our destination?

t_ch: 沿着左边门后的回廊继续深入，有个放置了某种「奇物」的房间。
t_en: Go down the corridor behind the door on the left. There's a room where some kind of rare item is stored.

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}」就在那里？
t_en: So that's where the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} is?

t_ch: 它能告诉我们「星核」在哪里。
t_en: That's where we can find out where the Stellaron is.

t_ch: 载体锁定好了吗，随时可以带来？
t_en: Is the receptacle ready for use?

t_ch: 当然，只差你一个决定。
t_en: Of course. You just need to make the decision.

t_ch: 艾利欧说过，这个选择会改变很多东西……
t_en: Elio said this decision will bring about lots of changes...

t_ch: 艾利欧也说过，做出这个选择的人必须是你。
t_en: He also said it must be you who makes it.

t_ch: 反物质军团什么时候变得这么弱了？
t_en: When did the Antimatter Legion become so weak?

t_ch: 我能诱来的兵力就这么多了，你也不想这里被军团的主力盯上吧？
t_en: I could only attract this much. Did you really want the entire Legion to come here?

t_ch: 只有这种货色，拖不住星穹列车那伙人啊。
t_en: This lot won't be able to slow down the Astral Express crew.

t_ch: 放心，一只末日兽也来了。
t_en: Relax. A Doomsday Beast is also here.

t_ch: 要给{M#他}{F#她}一个新的名字么？
t_en: Wanna give {M#him}{F#her} a new name?
Hmm...

t_ch: 好了，就这个吧。
t_en: Alright, that's it.

t_ch: 找到「星核」前，你还有反悔的时间。
t_en: You can still change your mind before we find the Stellaron.

t_ch: 后面已经十分接近空间站的关键区域，「军团」的主力应该也都集中在那里。
t_en: We're getting close to the central area of the space station, the main force of the Legion must be there.

t_ch: 可这对我们来说并不是问题。
t_en: Not a problem, for us.

t_ch: 我姑且提醒一下。卡芙卡，这是个潜入任务。
t_en: Just a reminder — this is a stealth mission, Kafka.

t_ch: 把它们通通做掉，就不会有人知道我们来过咯。
t_en: No one will know we were here if they are all dead.

t_ch: 前面是空间站的核心区域，反物质军团的虚卒会很多喔。
t_en: The central area of the space station is up ahead. There will be lots of Legion Voidrangers there.

t_ch: 好啊。
t_en: Okay~

t_ch: 停。
t_en: Hold it.

t_ch: 有什么东西在前面。
t_en: Someone, or something, is up ahead.

t_ch: 看来被埋伏的是我们。
t_en: Looks like we're the ones getting ambushed.

t_ch: 可惜被包围的是它们。
t_en: But they're the ones getting besieged.

t_ch: 一个人都没有，疏散做得相当彻底呢。是黑塔亲自下的指示么？
t_en: Not a single soul here. Impressive evacuation work. Did Herta organize it herself?

t_ch: 看访问记录，那女人都大半年没登录过这里了，避难工作是由代理站长——一个叫艾丝妲的人指挥的。
t_en: According to the access history, she hasn't logged in here for over six months. The evacuation was directed by the acting lead researcher — a girl named Asta.

t_ch: 没听过的名字…啊，艾利欧好像说过我们不会碰上黑塔，看来她是真的不在。
t_en: Doesn't ring a bell. Oh, right, Elio said we wouldn't run into Herta. It seems she really isn't here.

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}」在哪里？
t_en: Where's the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 艾利欧的剧本没有提到「星核」的具体位置，也就是说在他看到的未来里……
t_en: Elio's script doesn't include any info about the location of the Stellaron, which means in the future he foresees...

t_ch: ——我们并不是通过物理移动手段找到「星核」的。
t_en: ...We would find the Stellaron in a non-physical way?

t_ch: 这空间站里匪夷所思的东西那么多，有这样的「奇物」也不出奇。
t_en: This space station is packed with extraordinary objects, I wouldn't be surprised if there's one that can make it happen.

t_ch: 用「奇物」隐藏「奇物」，的确是那女人会干的事情…你翻了那么久目录，想必有头绪了吧？
t_en: Hiding something extraordinary with something extraordinary... this is pretty Herta. I assume you know what to do? I mean, you've read that catalog for quite a while.

t_ch: 必要的线索都有了，接下来只需要一点小小的技巧。
t_en: I've got all the clues we need. The only piece missing is a simple trick.

t_ch: 帮我调查下房间里的终端设备，「奇物」或许就在里边。
t_en: Help me investigate the terminal in this room, our item might be inside.

t_ch: 好，看你表演啦~
t_en: Okay, the stage is yours~

t_ch: 整个空间站都在监控画面里了…但我没看见「星核」。
t_en: I can see the whole space station on the surveillance screen... but not the Stellaron.

t_ch: 就算有也是陷阱，黑塔的收藏不可能对外展示。
t_en: Even if you could, it'd be a trap. Herta doesn't display her collections.

t_ch: 咦，这个终端的存储设备不见了……
t_en: Huh? I can't see the memory storage for this terminal...

t_ch: 这是监控室，删库跑路一条龙，业内传统了。
t_en: This is the monitoring room, they must have deleted the records and made a run for it. Classic.

t_ch: 你还是过来吧，这样调查一点也不效率。
t_en: *sigh* Make your way over here then, there's no point in trying to search like this.

t_ch: 怎么样，有什么发现？
t_en: Well? Found anything?

t_ch: 你知道这房间里有多少显示器么？
t_en: Do you know how many monitors are in the room?

t_ch: 不知道，也不需要知道。
t_en: I don't know, and don't need to know.

t_ch: 那调查这些东西的重要性是？
t_en: What's so important about investigating this?

t_ch: 不让你闲着。
t_en: So you won't get bored.

t_ch: 所以黑塔的防御系统破解起来真的这么麻烦？
t_en: Is Herta's security system really that difficult to crack?

t_ch: 有一点点，不过也就这样。
t_en: It's definitely not easy... but whatever.

t_ch: 「军团」的入侵让这儿的主控系统瘫痪了几分钟，省了我不少工夫。
t_en: The Legion's invasion paralyzed the master control system for a few minutes, which was a big help.

t_ch: 好了，过来吧。
t_en: Done. Come over.

t_ch: 准备已经就绪，你的调查提前结束了。
t_en: Everything's ready. You can stop your investigation.

t_ch: （看起来只是普通的终端，显示屏的内容也没什么可疑的地方……）
t_en: (It just looks like an ordinary terminal. There's nothing unusual on the screen...)

t_ch: 所以，你有什么妙计？我洗耳恭听。
t_en: So, got a master plan? I'm all ears.

t_ch: 直接把监控系统黑掉了事。
t_en: It's a matter of hacking the surveillance system directly.

t_ch: 啊，原来如此。黑塔的收藏一定独立于系统之外，所以不受影响的就是目标。
t_en: Aha, I see. Herta's collections aren't in the system, so anything unaffected should be our target.

t_ch: 简单粗暴但行之有效。你看，找着了。
t_en: Simple, crude, but effective. Look, found it.

t_ch: 这是什么？
t_en: Huh. What's this?

t_ch: 奇物编号<unbreak>211</unbreak>「视野盲区」：一个简单的偏折光场，让区域里的事物不容易引起注意，但只要别的东西不再显眼，它就露馅了。
t_en: Item number <unbreak>211</unbreak>, "Blind Spot": A simple light-deflecting field. It allows an object in its field to pass unnoticed, but if a different item ceases to be obvious, the object gets revealed.

t_ch: 黑塔用这么简单的小玩意藏她的宝贝？
t_en: So Herta hides her collection with something as simple as this?

t_ch: 越简单的手法越不容易识破，这不是我们的座右铭吗？
t_en: The simplest method is the hardest to spot, isn't that our motto?

t_ch: 又多了个怪东西。
t_en: *whistle* Strange thing number two...

t_ch: 数据上看只是普通的全息影像，但它加了层壳……
t_en: The data suggests it's just an ordinary hologram. But it has an added layer...

t_ch: 穿过去看看呗。不要紧，咱俩不会折在这儿的。
t_en: Let's take a look. Don't worry, this place won't be our grave.

t_ch: 你看到了吧？刚刚那几只被你消灭的怪物，其中有一只，它的头围、腰围、臀围，乃至左边大腿第一个关节处的耦合都与别的不同！
t_en: Hey, did you notice that one of the monsters you just defeated had a different body build? Even the joint on its left leg looked different from the others.

t_ch: 我很确信就是它…就是它害死了阿尔弗雷德！
t_en: I'm pretty sure that's what... what killed Alfred!

t_ch: 成功了…我终于成功了！终于为阿尔弗雷德报了仇！
t_en: I did it! I finally did it! I finally avenged Alfred!

t_ch: 没想到我难得鼓起勇气，出来替温队长跑腿，竟然就阴差阳错大仇得报。这就是命运吗，呜，呜呜……
t_en: I had to gather up so much courage to come do Mr. Wen's errands, and who knew it would turn out to be an avenging trip? Is this fate? *sniff*

t_ch: 替温队长跑腿？
t_en: Running errands for Mr. Wen?

t_ch: 是啊，温队长让我到收容舱段的奇物分拣室替他取一件东西。
t_en: Yep, Mr. Wen asked me to go to the Curio Sorting Room in the Storage Zone to pick up an item for him.

t_ch: 温队长说你失踪了。
t_en: Mr. Wen said you were missing.

t_ch: 温队长说我失踪了？不是他让我到收容舱段的奇物分拣室替他取东西的嘛。
t_en: Mr. Wen said I was missing? But he was the one who sent me here to fetch stuff for him.

t_ch: 你差点就死了！
t_en: You almost died!

t_ch: 人总是要死的…况且，我不还活得好好的嘛。
t_en: Life is but a path to death... Besides, I'm still pretty alive now.

t_ch: 你这么关心我的样子，又让我回想起阿尔弗雷德…如今，我的夙愿终于了结。
t_en: The way you care so much about me reminds me of Alfred... Now, my wish is finally fulfilled.

t_ch: 但在回去之前，我还得到奇物分拣室替温队长取一件东西。
t_en: But before I return, I still have to pick up a thing for Mr. Wen in the Curio Sorting Room.

t_ch: 他说你失踪了。
t_en: He said you were missing.

t_ch: 温队长说我失踪了？明明是他派我出来的呀。
t_en: Mr. Wen said I was missing? But he was the one who sent me here.

t_ch: 这对不上呀…你看，他还给了我执行书。
t_en: This makes no sense... Look, he also gave me this executive order.

t_ch: 看到了吧？这可是温队长亲手向我开出的临时调任执行启示。白纸黑字，清清楚楚。
t_en: See? This is the executive order that Mr. Wen personally gave me. It's a notice of an Ad Hoc Transfer. All written in black and white, clear as day.

t_ch: 大裤衩是奇物？
t_en: So even boxers can be Curio?

t_ch: 难道不是吗？！如果只是一条普通的大裤衩，温队长为什么要托我来取？
t_en: Are they not!? If it's just an ordinary pair of boxers, why would Mr. Wen ask me to pick them up?

t_ch: 你叫鸭脖拉罕？
t_en: Your name is Aburgerham?

t_ch: 那可能是温队长昼夜颠倒，事务繁忙，一时疏忽而已。
t_en: Maybe Mr. Wen was so busy with his chores and stuff that he made an honest mistake.

t_ch: 这你都信了？！
t_en: You actually believe that!?

t_ch: 这封执行启示，可是温明德队长亲手交到我手里的，绝不会出错。
t_en: The order was handed to me by Mr. Wen Mingde himself. It can't be a mistake.

t_ch: 我还记得他当时瞳孔扩张，满头大汗，手也冰冰凉，连喉咙也隐约发出了咕噜咕噜的声音。
t_en: I still remember that his pupils were dilated, head covered in sweat, hands cold, and even his throat made a faint gurgling sound.

t_ch: 一定是想拿到这个奇物的心情过于急切，我得帮他把事办完……
t_en: He must've been really eager to get the Curio, so I have to get this done for him...

t_ch: 其中必定有诈！
t_en: This smells fishy!

t_ch: 你怎么神神叨叨的，不会也像我之前一样，被怪物刺激到了吧？
t_en: Why are you so weird about this? You aren't freaked out by the monsters like I was before, are you?

t_ch: 跟我回去对质。
t_en: Let's go back and check this with Mr. Wen.

t_ch: 还是不了吧，温明德队长亲自嘱咐我，我还要和他对质，太忘恩负义了……
t_en: I don't think this is a good idea. Mr. Wen Mingde personally gave me the task, and I can't just go back without completing it first...

t_ch: 那你去拿吧。
t_en: Then go and fetch your thing.

t_ch: 怎么又松口了？神神叨叨的，你不会也像我之前一样，被怪物刺激到了吧？
t_en: Why the change? Weird... You aren't freaked out by the monsters like I was before?

t_ch: 总之现在这儿也安全了，待会我就去把奇物拿回来。
t_en: Anyway, it's safe here. I'll go and get the Curio soon.

t_ch: 你要是有什么疑惑，拿着这封调任启示，先回去问问温明德队长吧……
t_en: If you have any doubts, just take this transfer order. Go back and ask Mr. Wen Mingde about it...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 别装了。
t_en: Drop the act, already.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 你别装了。
t_en: You drop the act.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 我知道是你，装成我的模样，到处坑蒙拐骗，现在竟然还敢明目张胆地站在这里。
t_en: I know it's you. You've been pretending to be me, deceiving everyone with your shenanigans. And now you have the audacity to stand here in front of me.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 你别恶人先告状，我在这儿站得好好的，你却凭空冒出来…我们两个，谁更可疑？
t_en: Excuse me, but who are you calling a fake? I was standing right here the whole time. You're the one who just appeared out of nowhere. I have witnesses who can confirm that. So tell me, who do you think looks suspicious here? You or me?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 诸位！现在情况很明显，<color=#dbc291ff>「异星水魈」</color>流窜已久是不争的事实。这水魈面貌变化多端，频频以假乱真……
t_en: Now, everyone, the situation is clear as day. It's already well-known that <color=#dbc291ff>Xenohydro</color> has been on the loose for a long time. Xenohydro can change its form and mimic others' appearances so perfectly that it's virtually impossible to tell the difference...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 但我没想到，这厮竟然如此大胆，竟然自行找上门来，妄想反客为主，将我取而代之。
t_en: But I never would have thought that this creature would be so bold, approaching us like this and trying to take my place.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 你别抢我的话。你说我是假的，你有证据吗？
t_en: Don't try to steal my words. You accused me of being fake, but do you have any proof to back up your claim?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 你说你是真的，那你有证据吗？
t_en: What about your claim? And where is the evidence to support it?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: {NICKNAME}，正好你来了，你怎么看？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you arrive just in time. What do you think?

t_ch: …我先走了。
t_en: Ugh. I should probably leave.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 等等，现在只有你能证明我真的是我，刚刚同你对话的温明德！
t_en: Wait, don't just leave. You're now the only one who can prove that I am really me. I am the real Wen Mingde, who just spoke with you earlier. Remember?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 对了，亚伯拉罕呢？你没找到他？
t_en: By the way, where's Abraham? Did you find him?

t_ch: 我有办法辨明。
t_en: I might have a way to solve this.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 你发现了什么异常？速速说来，我可不想和它纠缠不清！
t_en: What is it then? Spit it out. I don't want to waste any more time with that thing!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 对了，亚伯拉罕呢？你没找到他？
t_en: By the way, where's Abraham? Did you find him?

t_ch: 打起来打起来。
t_en: You guys should fight it out.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 哎呀你呀，看热闹不嫌事大！
t_en: Ugh, you really don't care, do you?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 对了，亚伯拉罕呢？你没找到他？
t_en: By the way, where's Abraham? Did you find him?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 还有你手上拿的这张调任启示是……
t_en: And what's this transfer order in your hands...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 取回<color=#dbc291ff>「晶彩流光」…「大裤衩」</color>一条！可恶，你这水魈，竟然冒充我取走如此重要的奇物！
t_en: Retrieve the <color=#dbc291ff>Boxer with Colored Tortoiseshell Pattern</color>... You cheeky Xenohydro! How dare you use my identity to steal such a valuable Curio!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 如今，证据终于出现，是时候做个了断了。我建议，现在由{NICKNAME}主持公道。
t_en: Now that the evidence is all clear, it's time to end this. I suggest {NICKNAME} make the call.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 我附议。{NICKNAME}，你说说该怎么办？
t_en: I agree. {NICKNAME}, what do you say?

t_ch: 检查生命体征。
t_en: We should check the vital signs.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 这一点已经有队员先一步提出，检查我们二人的瞳孔、汗腺、发声、体温。
t_en: We've done that already. The team here has checked our pupils, sweat glands, voice, and body temperature.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 但也许是场面过于紧张的缘故，我们二人无不瞳孔放大、一身冷汗、声音颤抖、体温冰凉。
t_en: But perhaps the tension was simply too high to act normally. Our pupils were both dilated, we were both sweating profusely, our voices were trembling, and our bodies were cold to the touch.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 唉！只怪我的心理素质不够过硬，否则真假早已见分晓。
t_en: Ugh! Wish I wasn't so worked up, otherwise we would've been able to tell by now.

t_ch: 检查落款字迹。
t_en: Check the signature.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 别白费力气了，那启示上所写「温命得」落款，显然是水魈的公然挑衅。
t_en: Don't waste your time. The note signed "Wen Mingy" was obviously a blatant mockery of me by the Xenohydro.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 他对我的样貌秉性能仿个九九真，即使要求笔迹比对，他也不会露出马脚。
t_en: He can imitate my looks and personality really well, so I don't think that handwriting will be too difficult for him either.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 打从一开始我就观察过，我们二人身上都带着小队日常出勤所用的书面委托，各位可以随意检阅。
t_en: I noticed both of us are carrying the written orders for the team's daily attendance, which you can review at will.

t_ch: 比对大裤衩！
t_en: We should check the boxers!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 那大裤衩是奇物，不是用来穿的，何况也并非我温某人的私产，瞎比对什么！
t_en: Those boxers are a Curio and are not to be worn! Not to mention that they are not my personal property. What's there to check!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 这大裤衩分明是水魈对我的栽赃！我温明德作为堂堂应物科负责人，奇物再收容小队队长，绝不能让水魈牵着鼻子走，被人随意戏弄！
t_en: These boxers are clearly planted by the Xenohydro! I, Wen Mingde, the dignified leader of the Department of Implement Arts and head of the Curio Collection Squad, will not allow the Xenohydro to mock me like this!

t_ch: 先这样吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你意下如何？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

t_ch: （再观察看看）
t_en: (Wait and see)

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 唉…要我说，最简单的方法，就是把我们两个都抓起来。
t_en: *sigh* Can't believe I'm gonna say this, but the easiest way is to arrest both of us.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 你什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 事已至此，我不愿继续放任水魈为害空间站。既然我们之中必有一人为假，不如牺牲我的个人自由，换来小队的安宁。
t_en: At this point, I must stop the Xenohydro from further harming the space station. To protect the whole team, I am willing to sacrifice my own freedom.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 别在这里惺惺作态……
t_en: Don't act so holier-than-thou...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 我也相信，只要关押时长够久，水魈终会耐不住寂寞，现出原形。
t_en: I also think that, if we're locked up long enough, the Xenohydro will get bored eventually and show its true colors.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 我看你是想把我拉到和你一样悲惨的境地。
t_en: I see. So you are just trying to drag me into the same miserable situation as you.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 即使是呆在收容舱内，我也可以指挥好奇物再收容工作。
t_en: Even if I get locked up in the containment chamber, I can still lead the Curio retrieval efforts.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 可恶，我可不想回去！
t_en: Ugh. I don't wanna go back!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 你刚说什么？
t_en: What did you just say?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「回去」</color>？大家都听见了吧，他承认了！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Go back"</color>? Everybody heard him. He admitted it!

t_ch: 兵不厌诈。
t_en: All's fair in love and war.

t_ch: 这也可以？！
t_en: Seriously!?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 嘻，嘻嘻，温命得，你的「无私」真是让人感动……
t_en: Hehe, hehehe, Mr. Wen Mingy, your willingness to "sacrifice" yourself like that is quite touching, isn't it?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 我本来只是想逗你玩玩，没想到引来这么多人……
t_en: I only wanted to tease you a bit. Never expected to catch so much attention.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 可惜，我绝不会束手就擒——
t_en: Unfortunately for you, I won't give up that easily—

t_ch: （诈他试试）
t_en: (Try to dupe him)

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 问了这么多，我想你心里已经有了判断吧？
t_en: After so many questions, I think you would've made your choice, no?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 我觉得{F#她}{M#他}没有。
t_en: I don't think {F#she}{M#he} has.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 别听他的，说好了由{NICKNAME}主持全局。我们两个，究竟孰真孰假？
t_en: Don't listen to him. It's up to {NICKNAME} to make the call. Who's real and who's fake?

t_ch: 左边？
t_en: The one on the left?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 哈哈！我果然没有看错这位年轻人，火眼金睛，火眼金睛！
t_en: Haha! I knew I was right about you. Good choice, good choice!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 可恶，我们凭什么相信你的判断？你这不知道从哪里冒出来的臭家伙……
t_en: Ugh, why should we trust your judgment? You are a stinky outsider who came out of nowhere...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 你可别输不起啊。
t_en: Don't be a sore loser.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 咦？他的瞳孔正在异常放大，周身快速分泌汗液，毛发濡湿……
t_en: Huh? His pupils are dilating abnormally. Sweat is quickly secreting all over his body, and his hair is wet...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 他就是水魈！
t_en: He is the Xenohydro!

t_ch: 不愧是我，鱼儿上钩了！
t_en: Ha! So it worked!

t_ch: 其实我是随便蒙的…
t_en: Actually, that was a random pick.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 咕噜噜…坏了我的好事，一点也不好玩……
t_en: *gurgle*... You spoiled my plan. This is not fun...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 敢戳穿我的伪装，我要让你付出代价——
t_en: How dare you expose me? I'll make you pay...

t_ch: 右边？
t_en: The one on the right?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 嘻，嘻嘻，你的选择太正确了。还不快把对面的冒牌货抓起来，咕噜噜……
t_en: Hee, hee hee, you made the right choice. Hurry up and lock up the fake on the opposite side, *gurgle*...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 我才不是水魈！而且，请等一下，没有人听到他发出了奇怪的声音吗？
t_en: I'm not the Xenohydro! Wait a minute, did anyone hear him make that weird noise?

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 不要垂死挣扎了咕，连{NICKNAME}都说你是假的咕噜噜……
t_en: Don't waste your time, *gurgle*. Even {NICKNAME} says you're a fake, *gurgle*...

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hand on Hip
t_ch: 那是水魈特有的水喉音！
t_en: That's the watery, guttural sound unique to the Xenohydro!

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 咕噜噜…没想到一时得意忘形，功亏一篑啊……
t_en: *gurgle*... I got carried away. Never could've thought I'd fail at the last minute...

t_ch: 没想到歪打正着…
t_en: Well, I guess I got it right after all.

t_ch: 拜托你装到底啊…
t_en: Ugh, at least keep the act till the end.

s_en: Wen Mingde With Hands Spread out
t_ch: 事已至此，我也只能陪你们玩玩了——
t_en: Well, I guess I'll have to sort you out.

t_ch: 所有人报数！
t_en: Fall in and count!

t_ch: …人数正确，一个不多，一个不少。还是被那水魈逃掉了，唉。
t_en: The numbers are right, not one more, not one less. Alas, the Xenohydro had escaped.

t_ch: 快追！
t_en: Hurry up and chase it!

t_ch: 追也没用，那水魈一定已经化作普通科员样貌，逃出收容舱段，混入了别处。
t_en: There's no point. The Xenohydro must have disguised itself as a staff member already. Probably already out of the storage zone and on the way to other places.

t_ch: 可惜了。
t_en: We're so close.

t_ch: 都怪我办事不力。这下，我该如何向艾丝妲站长交代啊……
t_en: It's all my fault. Now, how should I explain this to Lead Researcher Asta...

t_ch: …哎，有了这次经验，在小队内部设立暗号迫在眉睫，以免同样的闹剧再次上演。
t_en: Hey, we learn from our mistakes. It is imperative to set up a secret code within the squad to prevent the same farce from ever happening again.

t_ch: 我会将此事上报给辛克尔夫人，请求她提供更多人手，早日将水魈收容归案。
t_en: I will report this to Mrs. Hinkel and ask her to assign more staff to apprehend the Xenohydro as soon as possible.

t_ch: 这场乌龙让你看了笑话，真是过意不去。一点薄礼，不成心意，还要请你收下。
t_en: Sorry to get you involved in this fuss. Here's a little something for your trouble. It's not much, but please accept it.

t_ch: 若是在别处寻获水魈踪迹，还请记得奇物再收容小队一直在，始终在，永远在。切莫孤军奋战——收队！
t_en: If you ever find the Xenohydro elsewhere, remember that the Curio Collection Squad is always here. Don't try to fight it alone. Everyone, fall in!

t_ch: …水魈的战斗能力被解除了。
t_en: The Xenohydro's combat abilities have been neutralized.

t_ch: 以中央电梯为基线，橄榄形编队，准备收容！注意你们身边多出来的任何一个人！
t_en: Everyone, fall in an olive-shaped formation! And use the central elevator as our starting point! Prepare for the collection process! Pay attention to anyone suspicious around you!

t_ch: （一阵混乱，什么也看不清。似乎有东西在快速移动！）
t_en: (There is a burst of chaotic activity and everything was a blur. Something seems to be moving fast!)

t_ch: （…混乱逐渐止息了。）
t_en: (... The chaos gradually subsides.)

t_ch: 军团雄赳赳，黑塔乱糟糟，奇物柜子全打翻，忙得不亦乐乎~
t_en: The majestic Legion, the chaos in Herta, the Curio Cabinet... We can never seem to get a break from it all~

t_ch: 研究全部说拜拜，独自乐逍遥~
t_en: Time to bid farewell to research, and retire to a quiet, leisurely life~

t_ch: 咳，打断一下。
t_en: Ahem, excuse me.

t_ch: 你谁啊？没看我唱歌呢嘛，没礼貌。
t_en: Who are you? Didn't you see I was singing? Where are your manners?

t_ch: 乐逍遥~
t_en: Happy and free~

t_ch: 哟，你也是来放风的么？有品位！能跟我选中同一处地方。
t_en: Ah, I see you're a {F#lady}{M#man} of culture as well. You've also come out here to unwind, and even picked the same spot as me.

t_ch: 难得出来一次，就应该抓紧浪费时间！
t_en: It's not often you get the chance to waste time like this. Enjoy it while you can!

t_ch: 如果没有这次动乱，我现在还被关在舱室内搞他们那所谓「研究」呢。
t_en: If not for all the turmoil going on, I would still be locked up in the cabin doing their so-called research.

t_ch: 如今在这里，头发保住了，也不用担心混得比别人差，大不了大家一块玩儿完。
t_en: I've already made it this far, and with a full head of hair at that. No need to worry about other people living better than you, the worst that can happen is we all perish together.

t_ch: 你看。从光年之外抵达的天鹰座星光，哪怕它是预示着毁灭的中微子爆发，能看到这样的美景，怎么着都值啦。
t_en: Look at it this way. Even if there's a neutrino burst that heralds destruction, it's still worth it to see such a beautiful sight.

t_ch: 像现在这样自由地挥霍自己的人生，我简直太~快~乐~了~
t_en: I'm so happy now to be able to freely waste my own life, just... so... happy~

t_ch: 需要帮忙吗？
t_en: Do you need help with anything?

t_ch: 你说呢？你已经分走了我的一点快乐！刚好有个活，你替我办了吧。
t_en: What do you say? You've already shared some of my joy, so you may as well share some of my chores!

t_ch: 那我走了。
t_en: Well I'm off, then.

t_ch: 别走啊！你已经分走了我的一点快乐！不得补偿一下吗？
t_en: Wait a second! You've already shared some of my joy, shouldn't you return the favor?

t_ch: 手上刚好有个活，你替我办了吧。
t_en: I happen to have a job on my hands that you could help out with.

t_ch: 我们应物科受上边之托，正在盘点空间站的各项亏损。其中，月台区域由我负责。
t_en: We in the Department of Implement Arts have received orders to take stock of the various losses of the space station. That includes evaluating areas like the railway platform.

t_ch: 这附近因「军团」入侵而受损的资产，无论动产不动产，统统要<color=#dbc291ff>拍照定损</color>，报给「星际和平公司」。
t_en: All assets damaged by the Legion in the area, whether mobile or immobile, must be <color=#dbc291ff>photographed</color> and reported to IPC.

t_ch: 我一个人忙不过来，你给我搭把手吧。放心，帮我办事，好处少不了你的。
t_en: My hands are full already, so why don't you lend me one? Don't worry, there'll be something in it for you too.

t_ch: 那我去去就回。
t_en: I'll be on my way then.

t_ch: 嗯。那我就在这儿，哼着小曲儿等你~
t_en: Hmm. And I'll be waiting for you here, humming some tunes~

t_ch: 你呆着看星星吧。
t_en: Maybe you can do some stargazing in the meantime.

t_ch: 随你怎么耍嘴皮子，把事儿给我办了就行。我就在这儿，哼着小曲儿等你~
t_en: Smart mouth you've got there! You just worry about getting those photos. I'll be waiting for you here, humming some tunes~

t_ch: 星星直堪摘，银河直堪赏~
t_en: The cosmos is indeed a sight to behold.

t_ch: 回来啦，动作还挺快。来来来，我这账本上有的是空余地方，看看你都拍了些啥？
t_en: Back already? You're fast! Here, I have plenty of blank space in this ledger. Let's see what you managed to capture.

t_ch: 裂界侵蚀的月台。
t_en: The railway platform corroded by the Fragmentum.

t_ch: 月台破损竟如此严重……
t_en: That's some hefty damage...
